description: Stratified routing eval baseline for skill-graph-routing-eval.js --baseline mode. Each entry maps a human-authored query to the expected top-1 skill. Queries are principle-grounded (portable, no Sales Hub or personal data). Run: node scripts/skill-graph-routing-eval.js --baseline evals/retrieval-baseline-v2.json
note: This baseline was hand-curated: every entry was verified to route correctly (Recall@1 hit) against skills.manifest.json before inclusion. Do not flip routing_eval: present on a skill without this verification.

queries.query: design an autonomous loop with a safety cap and completion detection
queries.rationale: Autonomous loop patterns is the canonical skill for loop design with safety caps.

queries.query: I want to write a new skill from scratch — where do I start?
queries.rationale: Skill-scaffold owns the new-skill authoring workflow.

queries.query: write a reusable prompt for an LLM to classify support tickets and return one JSON object per ticket
queries.rationale: Prompt-craft owns prompt authoring and structured output patterns.

queries.query: the agent ignored the instruction and used the wrong query helper — was the right context present?
queries.rationale: Context-engineering diagnoses whether relevant context reached the model.

queries.query: design the component schema for an assistant that can render a date picker, a chart, and a table
queries.rationale: Generative-ui owns component schema design for model-driven UIs.

queries.query: read this repo and extract the durable domain knowledge an agent should keep next time
queries.rationale: Project-knowledge-extraction owns extracting reusable knowledge from a codebase.

queries.query: design the message-shape contract between a model and a tool runtime
queries.rationale: Tool-call-flow owns the message protocol between model and tool executor.

queries.query: the agent made 17 read_file calls when 3 greps would have done — what should it have done?
queries.rationale: Tool-call-strategy owns tool call efficiency and sequencing decisions.

queries.query: we keep accepting agent-generated code on first try and shipping bugs — what discipline fixes this?
queries.rationale: AI-native-development owns the discipline around accepting agent output.

queries.query: our skill library is growing and we are getting silent decay — eval counts dropping, conflicts appearing
queries.rationale: Skill-infrastructure owns library-level decay detection and eval health.

queries.query: this task has failed twice, I need a fresh approach not another retry on the same path
queries.rationale: Task-path-optimization owns task replanning and escape from stuck loops.

queries.query: we keep adding tooling and agent throughput is not going up — what is the constraint?
queries.rationale: Constraint-awareness owns TOC-style bottleneck analysis for agent workflows.

queries.query: users keep trying to drag a row to reorder but the table does not support drag — what mental model mismatch?
queries.rationale: Mental-models owns user mental model analysis and mismatch diagnosis.

queries.query: should Customer and Organization be disjoint classes in this ontology?
queries.rationale: Ontology-modeling owns class hierarchy and disjointness decisions.

queries.query: I keep seeing the same null-pointer crash in three different files — what is the systemic fix?
queries.rationale: Pattern-recognition owns identifying systemic failure patterns across the codebase.

queries.query: my tests pass locally but fail in CI — why?
queries.rationale: Debugging is the canonical skill for environment-dependent test failures.

queries.query: size a connection pool for a workload with N application servers and M cores per server
queries.rationale: Connection-pooling owns pool sizing calculations and workload analysis.

queries.query: decide whether a new distributed service should be CP or AP given its workload
queries.rationale: Cap-theorem-tradeoffs owns CP vs AP consistency model decisions.

queries.query: explain what ACID guarantees a database does and does not provide to the application developer
queries.rationale: Acid-fundamentals owns ACID guarantee explanations and scope.

queries.query: design the API for listing orders with filters, pagination, and stable errors
queries.rationale: Api-design owns REST/GraphQL API surface design.

queries.query: explain why a table is in 2NF but not 3NF and what change would bring it to 3NF
queries.rationale: Data-modeling-fundamentals owns normalization theory and form analysis.

queries.query: add a nullable column to a 50M-row orders table without taking downtime
queries.rationale: Database-migration owns zero-downtime schema change patterns.

queries.query: audit whether this repo has duplicate-purpose dependencies and unsafe package boundaries
queries.rationale: Dependency-architecture owns dependency boundary and duplication audits.

queries.query: decide whether this should use SSE or WebSocket for a live progress feed
queries.rationale: Streaming-architecture owns protocol selection for real-time data delivery.

queries.query: decide whether a product page should be SSG with revalidation or SSR
queries.rationale: Rendering-models owns SSG vs SSR vs ISR rendering strategy decisions.

queries.query: implement signature verification for a new third-party webhook handler
queries.rationale: Webhook-integration owns signature verification and idempotency patterns.

queries.query: two of our agents claimed the same task and produced duplicate PRs — what atomic coordination pattern fixes this?
queries.rationale: Agent-engineering owns multi-agent coordination and atomic task claim patterns.

queries.query: design replication for synchronous vs asynchronous replication given an RPO target
queries.rationale: Replication-patterns owns replication topology and synchrony tradeoffs.

queries.query: diagnose a query that takes 8 seconds and identify the plan node responsible
queries.rationale: Query-optimization owns query plan diagnosis and performance fixes.

queries.query: decide whether a dashboard widget should be a Server Component or a Client Component
queries.rationale: Server-components-design owns the Server Component vs Client Component decision.

queries.query: design a Server Action for a create comment form that works without JavaScript
queries.rationale: Server-actions-design owns Server Action form patterns and progressive enhancement.

queries.query: design a Route that receives a Stripe webhook — verify signature before parsing the body
queries.rationale: Route-handler-design owns webhook route handler structure and security ordering.

queries.query: model the order fulfillment status lifecycle so invalid transitions are impossible
queries.rationale: State-machine-modeling owns status lifecycle modeling with enforced transitions.

queries.query: decide whether a piece of state should be in the URL, component state, or persistent storage
queries.rationale: State-management owns component state locality decisions (URL, local, global).

queries.query: choose an isolation level for a workload that has concurrent balance-decrement operations
queries.rationale: Transaction-isolation owns isolation level selection for concurrent write patterns.

queries.query: set up trunk-based branching and feature flags for a five-person engineering team
queries.rationale: Version-control owns branching strategy, trunk-based dev, and feature flag lifecycle.

queries.query: extract the duplicated validation logic from three handlers into a helper, keeping tests green
queries.rationale: Refactor is the canonical workflow skill for safe structural code changes.

queries.query: set up exception reporting for a new React and Next.js application
queries.rationale: Error-tracking owns exception reporting setup and error boundary integration.

queries.query: choose a shard key for a multi-tenant system where 90% of queries are tenant-scoped
queries.rationale: Sharding-strategy owns shard key selection and hot-shard diagnosis.

queries.query: Verify an incoming Shopify webhook by computing HMAC SHA-256 over the raw body
queries.rationale: Shopify skill owns Shopify-specific webhook verification patterns.

queries.query: Create a Printify product from a blueprint and print provider set and publish it to a shop
queries.rationale: Printify skill owns Printify API product creation and publishing.

queries.query: plan ESLint rule introduction for a monorepo that has never had linting
queries.rationale: Lint-overlay is the overlay skill for safe lint rule rollout in existing codebases.

queries.query: audit a route handler for authn, authz, and input validation
queries.rationale: Security-fundamentals owns the auth + input validation audit checklist.

queries.query: this modal is keyboard-trapped — users cannot Escape to close it
queries.rationale: A11y is the canonical skill for keyboard accessibility and focus trap issues.

queries.query: design a consumer-driven contract test between a frontend and a backend service
queries.rationale: Contract-testing owns consumer-driven contract design and Pact patterns.

queries.query: audit this endpoint for SQL injection and XSS specifically
queries.rationale: Owasp-security owns OWASP Top 10 specific vulnerability audits.

queries.query: design a load test for an API endpoint that verifies the p95 SLO at expected production traffic
queries.rationale: Performance-testing owns load, stress, and soak test design.

queries.query: set a Core Web Vitals budget for a marketing landing page and enforce it in CI
queries.rationale: Performance-budgets owns Core Web Vitals budget definition and CI enforcement.

queries.query: do I need a unit test for this pure formatter or is integration enough?
queries.rationale: Testing-strategy owns test level selection decisions across the pyramid.

queries.query: explain why a 90% coverage codebase might have a 40% mutation score and what that means
queries.rationale: Mutation-testing owns mutation score interpretation and its relationship to line coverage.

queries.query: decide whether a rendered component is a candidate for a snapshot test or behavioral tests
queries.rationale: Snapshot-testing owns snapshot vs behavioral test selection decisions.

queries.query: review whether this RAG pipeline retrieved documents can override the system prompt
queries.rationale: Prompt-injection-defense owns RAG pipeline injection risk analysis.

queries.query: design an e2e test suite for an onboarding journey: signup, email verify, first dashboard visit
queries.rationale: E2e-test-design owns end-to-end test suite design for user journeys.

queries.query: should this control be a dropdown, combobox, radio group, or stepper?
queries.rationale: Interaction-patterns owns control selection decisions for data entry.

queries.query: add a dark mode toggle with system / light / dark options and persist the user preference
queries.rationale: Dark-mode-implementation owns dark mode toggle, system preference, and persistence.

queries.query: design the validation lifecycle for this signup form
queries.rationale: Form-ux-architecture owns validation lifecycle, required-field grouping, and error recovery.

queries.query: our docs have good content but nobody can find the setup instructions — how should we restructure?
queries.rationale: Information-architecture owns navigation design, findability, and hierarchy.

queries.query: Build a 10-step color scale from a brand seed color with perceptually even lightness steps
queries.rationale: Color-system-design owns perceptual color scale construction.

queries.query: Design a three-tier token system (reference, system, component) for a multi-brand product
queries.rationale: Theme-system-design owns multi-tier token architecture for theming.

queries.query: pick the right fidelity for a prototype that tests whether users will trust an AI-suggested action
queries.rationale: Prototyping owns prototype fidelity selection and testing method choice.

queries.query: pick a visual direction for this dashboard without changing the task structure
queries.rationale: Visual-design-foundations owns visual direction decisions for digital products.

queries.query: decide the H1 and H2 size ratios and weight contrast for a long-form article layout
queries.rationale: Visual-hierarchy owns heading size ratios and weight contrast for typography.

queries.query: design the API surface for a Dialog component that must work in multiple products
queries.rationale: Component-architecture owns reusable component API design and prop surface decisions.

queries.query: design loading, success, error, and retry feedback for this async action
queries.rationale: Interaction-feedback owns async action state feedback patterns.
